title: Data and Impact Analyst
summary: Turn court data into evidence that travels: dashboards, cohort analyses and baseline studies that show what people-centric courts change for litigants.
body:
## The role

The ON Court model spreads because its results are public and measurable: 164 days median to disposal, 98% of hearings held as scheduled. Someone has to keep that evidence honest, current and legible. That is you.

[draft description, refine before publishing]

## What you'll do

- Maintain and extend the public dashboard and its analyses
- Run cohort studies (survival analysis, stage medians) comparing ON Courts with conventional baselines
- Package findings for judges, policymakers and the public

## Who this suits

- Strong statistics and data-storytelling skills; SQL and Python or R
- Care for methodological honesty over impressive numbers
- 2 days a week, flexibly scheduled

## How it works

Paid part-time engagement through a PUCAR collective member organisation.
